title: Khartoum North Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Khartoum North with a Z-Score of +6.14. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Khartoum North is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 20.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 19%, making the heat feel even more intense, while the wind speed is at 13.4 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating, and the focus is on cooling and mitigating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to protect against the heat wave's critical conditions.
